LanguageData.Ammo_3030Winchester_FMJ.label: .30-30 Winchester (FMJ)
LanguageData.Ammo_3030Winchester_FMJ.description: One of the most popular centerfire cartridges, used mostly in lever-action rifles. Its effectiveness as a medium game hunting round has made it widely used.
LanguageData.Ammo_3030Winchester_AP.label: .30-30 Winchester (AP)
LanguageData.Ammo_3030Winchester_AP.description: One of the most popular centerfire cartridges, used mostly in lever-action rifles. Its effectiveness as a medium game hunting round has made it widely used.
LanguageData.Ammo_3030Winchester_HP.label: .30-30 Winchester (HP)
LanguageData.Ammo_3030Winchester_HP.description: One of the most popular centerfire cartridges, used mostly in lever-action rifles. Its effectiveness as a medium game hunting round has made it widely used.
LanguageData.Ammo_3030Winchester_Incendiary.label: .30-30 Winchester (AP-I)
LanguageData.Ammo_3030Winchester_Incendiary.descripti: One of the most popular centerfire cartridges, used mostly in lever-action rifles. Its effectiveness as a medium game hunting round has made it widely used.
LanguageData.Ammo_3030Winchester_HE.label: .30-30 Winchester (AP-HE)
LanguageData.Ammo_3030Winchester_HE.description: One of the most popular centerfire cartridges, used mostly in lever-action rifles. Its effectiveness as a medium game hunting round has made it widely used.
LanguageData.Ammo_3030Winchester_Sabot.label: .30-30 Winchester (Sabot)
LanguageData.Ammo_3030Winchester_Sabot.description: One of the most popular centerfire cartridges, used mostly in lever-action rifles. Its effectiveness as a medium game hunting round has made it widely used.
